query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the key summary:

**No new completed funding rounds were announced by any of the three companies specifically within June–July 2026.** The window is instead defined by IPO preparation and one active fundraising negotiation:

- **OpenAI** — No new round. The June–July news is its **confidential S-1 SEC filing (June 8, 2026)**, first step toward an IPO (leaning toward 2027). Latest completed round: **$122B at $852B post-money** (March 31, 2026).

- **Anthropic** — No new round in-window. Latest was **Series H: $65B at $965B post-money** (announced May 28, 2026, days before the window), which made it the most valuable AI startup. It has filed confidentially with the SEC and could IPO sooner than OpenAI.

- **Mistral AI** — The most concrete "imminent/expected" round: reported **early-stage talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B (~$23.15B) valuation** (Bloomberg/TechCrunch, June 12, 2026), **not yet closed** as of early July 2026. Latest completed equity round: **€1.7B Series C at €11.7B** (Sept 2025), plus ~$830M debt (March 2026).

Full synthesis, structured data points, and all sources have been provided via the StructuredOutput tool.

Note: AskNews was unavailable (credit limit reached), so findings are based on web search across primary sources (company blogs, CNBC, TechCrunch, Bloomberg, Forbes) and aggregators (Tracxn, Sacra).

sources.title: OpenAI closes record-breaking $122 billion funding round as anticipation builds for IPO
sources.snippet: OpenAI announced it closed a record-breaking funding round at a post-money valuation of $852 billion; the round totaled $122 billion of committed capital.

sources.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
sources.snippet: SoftBank co-led the round alongside a16z, D.E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, and T. Rowe Price, with participation from Amazon, Nvidia, and Microsoft; ~$3B from retail.

sources.title: OpenAI raises $110B in one of the largest private funding rounds in history
sources.snippet: $50 billion from Amazon, $30 billion each from Nvidia and SoftBank, against a $730 billion pre-money valuation; round remained open.

sources.title: OpenAI IPO: $850B Valuation, $25B Revenue [2026]
sources.snippet: On June 8, 2026, OpenAI confidentially submitted a draft S-1 to the SEC; leaning toward a 2027 listing per CFO Sarah Friar; ~$25B revenue run rate.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
sources.snippet: Anthropic raised $65 billion in Series H led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital, valuing the company at $965 billion post-money.

sources.title: Anthropic tops OpenAI as most valuable AI startup, nears $1 trillion valuation in latest round
sources.snippet: Anthropic announced a $65 billion Series H financing round at a $965 billion valuation, becoming the most valuable AI company.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
sources.snippet: Series H co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia; could be the AI startup's last private fundraising before public markets.

sources.title: Anthropic Could Be the Next Mega IPO
sources.snippet: Anthropic and OpenAI both filed confidentially with the SEC; OpenAI reportedly considering waiting until 2027; Anthropic could come to market sooner.

sources.title: Anthropic closes $30 billion funding round as cash keeps flowing into top AI startups
sources.snippet: Anthropic announced the close of a $30 billion Series G round at a $380 billion valuation.

sources.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
sources.snippet: Mistral in early discussions to raise ~€3 billion ($3.5 billion) at ~€20 billion valuation, per Bloomberg, nearly double its €11.7 billion Series C valuation.

sources.title: France's Mistral in Funding Talks at About €20 Billion Valuation
sources.snippet: Mistral in funding talks at about €20 billion valuation.

sources.title: Mistral AI raises 1.7B€ to accelerate technological progress with AI
sources.snippet: Series C funding round of €1.7B at €11.7B post-money valuation, led by ASML Holding NV.

sources.title: Mistral nearly doubles its valuation to €20B
sources.snippet: Early discussions to raise €3B at €20B valuation; already secured $830M debt in March 2026; ASML is Mistral's biggest shareholder.

sources.title: Anthropic revenue, valuation & funding
sources.snippet: Sacra estimates Anthropic hit $47B in annualized revenue in May 2026, up from $9B at end of 2025.

data_points.metric: Mistral reported target round size (in talks)
